title: heliotropium noeanum var. noeanum
intro: Heliotropium noeanum var. noeanum, also known as the Noyan Heliotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which may help alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and also reduce pain and inflammation. Heliotropium noeanum var. noeanum is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis.
